Featured Projects

⭐ FEATURED
HR Dashboard — Workforce Engagement Analytics

End-to-end people analytics dashboard built in Power BI covering 14,590 staff across multiple departments. Analysed 11 standardised engagement survey questions to uncover workforce sentiment gaps and deliver 8 strategic HR recommendations. Includes full 8-step data cleaning pipeline from raw data to validated Power BI star schema model.

Power BI HR Analytics ETL / Data Cleaning DAX Star Schema People Analytics
  • 14,590 staff surveyed | 99.96% completion rate
  • Lowest score: Learning & Growth (Q7) — 8 strategic recommendations delivered
  • Departmental breakdown: Director, Manager, Supervisor & Staff levels
  • Identified data integrity gap: 120-record discrepancy flagged & resolved
View Dashboard →
🤖
BUSINESS ANALYSIS
NVIDIA Corporation — Business Summary & Financial Analysis

Comprehensive business and financial summary of NVIDIA Corporation — the world's most valuable company ($4.5T market cap). Covers revenue trajectory, product segmentation, competitive landscape, and strategic opportunities including Sovereign AI and Automotive AI.

Financial Analysis Business Intelligence Market Research AI Industry SEC Filings
  • Revenue growth: $26.9B → $130.5B → ~$326B projected
  • EBITDA margin expansion: 33.8% → 74%+ projected
  • Competitive moat: 70–95% AI accelerator market share, 5M+ CUDA developers
  • Risks: 88% revenue concentration in Data Centers + China export controls

FINANCIAL MODEL
Aviation Acquisition — Synergy Analysis Model

Excel-based M&A synergy model for a national airline acquiring a regional carrier. Full three-scenario (Conservative / Midpoint / Aggressive) synergy output covering revenue and 5 cost drivers, with flex assumption cells and management-level documentation.

Excel Financial Modelling M&A Analysis Scenario Planning Synergy Analysis
  • Total synergies: $10M–$18M (10%–18.3% of revenue) across scenarios
  • 6 synergy drivers: Revenue, G&A, Fuel, Maintenance, Software, Aircraft Lease
  • Color-coded model with hardcoded inputs, formulas & flex assumptions
  • Next steps: QoE workstream, phased ramp Year 1–3, comparable M&A benchmarks
View Model →

M&A PRESENTATION
Cisco × Splunk — Merger Synergy Analysis Presentation

Executive-grade 3-slide merger synergy presentation for Cisco's $28B all-cash acquisition of Splunk (March 2024). Covers 4 synergy categories: Integrated Security Platform, AI & Data Analytics Edge, Cross-Sell Revenue Expansion, and Software-Led Business Model Transformation.

M&A Analysis Synergy Modelling Presentation Design Cybersecurity Strategy
  • $28B deal — Cisco's largest acquisition in company history

  • Cash flow positive FY2025, EPS accretive FY2026
